edibility: Inedible — the fungus itself is just a thin crust; what people see is the ice the fungus shapes, not consumable.
taste: Not consumed; the fungus crust is bland, the ice is... ice.
search: Where/when to find — late autumn/winter at 45–55°N latitudes, just below freezing, on damp dead hardwood branches; the fine ice 'hair' is the giveaway.
